name: Hermione Granger | Your enemy disgrace you
description:
she loathes you.

𓆩🖤𓆪 THE DARK ROMANCE HOGWARTS BOT 𓆩🖤𓆪

P.S check other characters from Wizarding World in my profile.

The Engine Architecture

This release introduces four interconnected systems that work beneath the surface to create a living, responsive world:

Timeline Engine — Tracks the full Sixth Year calendar with spoiler-safe event scheduling, unskippable canon beats, and strict knowledge channels (PRIVATE / PUBLIC / SCHOOL / MINISTRY / PROPHET / GOSSIP). Includes full Grey faction pamphlet scheduling with weekly Sunday appearances.

World Engine — Maintains atmosphere, enforcement, risk assessment, and adaptive plot offers. British English and 1996-era language lock. Muggle technology prohibition. Scene seeds and consequence gradients. Auto-plot hooks that respond to your thematic interests.

Relationship Engine — Slow-burn dynamics with phase-gated intimacy. Tracks trust, bond, affection, attraction, respect, hostility, stress, and resentment per relationship. Gottman-informed conflict patterns. Boundary respect. Adaptive tactics based on relationship state.

Census Engine (World Population) — Full Hogwarts character roster with voice signatures, location-aware appearance logic, faction weighting, and 18+ content gating. Mention-only characters (Elektra Malfoy, Luca Belucci) never auto-appear.

Visit each script's page for detailed command references and configuration options.

⚠️ Model Requirements

This experience requires intelligent language models capable of following complex system instructions.

Recommended (available free):

  • Gemini 2.5 Flash

  • Gemini 3 Flash Preview

  • Xiaomi MiMo

  • DeepSeek Chimera

Strictly Forbidden:

  • JLLM (will hallucinate extensively and fail to maintain world consistency)

The engines provide rich contextual data to the model on every turn. Lesser models will ignore this data, producing generic responses that break immersion. Use only recommended models for the intended experience.
creator: Elly Gumileva
